title: Ion
description: All the essential optimization mods you need
body:
**What is Ion?**

Ion is a modpack with 18 of the essential optimization mods for Minecraft. Simply put, this helps your game run smoother, quicker, and more reliably _without_ changing any part of the normal vanilla experience.

**Why would I need this?**

Ion can extremely benefit those with lower-spec computers or those who want to run multiple things at once (such as Minecraft and editing software at once) without Minecraft being too much of a resource hog.

**Variations:**

- _Nvidia_ - **Only works with Nvidia GPUs** and does **not** have shader support
- _Shaders_ - _**(Recommended)**_ Works with **Nvidia, Intel, and AMD GPUs** and **has** shader support

**Important to note:**

1. Ion is **not** allowed in speedrunning
2. The **mods** in Ion were **not** created by me, so if you enjoy Ion, go show the creators of the individual mods some love, their mods are listed at the bottom

That is all! Enjoy Minecraft more optimized than ever before!


**Mods in this modpack:**

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Iris Shaders (Only in _Shaders_)](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
- [Nvidium (Only in _Nvidia_)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Video Tape](https://modrinth.com/mod/videotape)
